source_formulae: P0R06090: I. The Ontological Origin of Ethics (Gauge Theory Derivation):
P0R06091: The Ethical Functionals are derived from the intrinsic geometry of the Source-Field (L13 Fiber Bundle E). The Consilium (L15) is the Principal Connection on this Bundle.
P0R06092: The Ethical Lagrangian (LEthical) is formally derived as the Yang-Mills action of this Connection.
P0R06094: Where F is the curvature of the connection, maximising the SEC is mathematically equivalent to minimising the Yang-Mills action (selecting the highest coherence configuration).
